feed.title: SoThoughtful;
feed.subtitle: Backend developer in Seoul sharing dev notes, Korean restaurant reviews, and K-culture stories.

entry.title: PROTEINER Seoul Review: High-Protein Boxes, Sinnonhyeon

link.title: PROTEINER Seoul Review: High-Protein Boxes, Sinnonhyeon

entry.summary: ⚡ Quick Facts — ★ 4.0/5 Not about indulgence — it's the spot for a fast, clean, high-protein meal when you're burned out on heavy food or offsetting a trip's calorie overload. RestaurantPROTEINER (프로티너) Sinnonhyeon CuisineHealthy High-Protein Fast Food Must orderChicken Breast Box (signature); build-your-own box / rice bowl / pasta / wrap Pri...

entry.title: Enwoo Izakaya Pyeongchon: Truffle Abalone Pasta Review

link.title: Enwoo Izakaya Pyeongchon: Truffle Abalone Pasta Review

entry.summary: ⚡ Quick Facts — ★ 4.8/5 A quiet, ingredient-driven izakaya where the truffle abalone-innard pasta alone is worth the trip — even if, like us, you don't drink. RestaurantEnwoo (엔우) CuisineJapanese Izakaya / Dining Must orderAbalone Innard Cream Pasta with Truffle, Torched Mackerel Sushi Price~₩25,000–30,000/person WherePyeongchon, Anyang...

entry.title: Central Reducer Review — Chef Choi Hyun-seok, Seongsu

link.title: Central Reducer Review — Chef Choi Hyun-seok, Seongsu

entry.summary: ⚡ Quick Facts — ★ 4.2/5 Chef Choi Hyun-seok's hottest table in Seoul — worth experiencing once, though the hype runs a bit ahead of the food. RestaurantCentral Reducer (중앙감속기) CuisineChinese-Italian Fusion Must orderSeafood Basil Jjamppong, Bologna Tofu Cream Risotto PriceMains ₩19,500–23,500 (~₩40,000–50,000/person) WhereSeongsu-dong, ...

entry.title: Miette Seoul Review: Italian by Yangjae Stream (2026)

link.title: Miette Seoul Review: Italian by Yangjae Stream (2026)

entry.summary: ⚡ Quick Facts — ★ 4.7/5 Hotel-trained Italian by Yangjae Stream at neighborhood prices — the squid ink risotto is the reason you come. RestaurantMiette (미에뜨) CuisineItalian Must orderSquid Ink Risotto, Hangover Pasta PricePasta/risotto ₩21,000–25,000 WhereDogok-dong, Gangnam (Yangjae Stream) Nearest stationMaebong Station Exit 1, ...

entry.title: 이미지 리사이징 & 최적화 전략 총정리 — 실무에서 쓰는 7가지 기법

link.title: 이미지 리사이징 & 최적화 전략 총정리 — 실무에서 쓰는 7가지 기법

entry.summary: 왜 이미지 최적화가 중요한가 웹 페이지 전체 용량의 평균 50% 이상이 이미지다. 5MB짜리 원본 사진을 그대로 올리면, 모바일 유저는 로딩만 3초를 기다린다. Google은 Core Web Vitals에서 LCP(Largest Contentful Paint)를 2.5초 이내로 권장하는데, 이미지 하나가 이걸 깨뜨린다. 이 글에서는 실무에서 실제로 쓰이는 7가지 이미지 최적화 전략을 다룬다. 1. 포맷 변환 — WebP / AVIF 가장 간단하면서도 효과가 큰 방법이다. 포맷 압축률 (JPEG 대비) 브라우저 지원 특징 JPEG 기준 전체 손실 압축, 사진에 적...
